947919b9a1cff393.title: PowerShell switch/quoting misuse
947919b9a1cff393.prevention: On Windows, prefer `node scripts/...` over nested powershell -Command. Never assign values to switch parameters. Use .ps1 files for multi-statement scripts; escape $ as `$ inside double-quoted -Command strings.

7eded1228610753c.title: next/dynamic ssr:false in Server Component
7eded1228610753c.prevention: Never use next/dynamic with { ssr: false } inside Server Components. Import client leaves statically when browser work is already behind useEffect.
7eded1228610753c.snippet: ssr: false is not allowed with next/dynamic in Server Components

72be20ed8866c7b5.title: WSL System32 bash wins over Git on Windows Machine PATH
72be20ed8866c7b5.prevention: ROOT CAUSE: bare bash was WSL System32 before Git. Fix: Admin scripts/fix-windows-bash-path.ps1 prepends Git\bin to Machine PATH. Verify where bash + agentos:health bash.ok. Policy ROOT_CAUSE.md.
72be20ed8866c7b5.snippet: The system cannot find the file specified when hooks call bash; where bash shows System32\bash.exe first

cae6658adb6d1801.title: Semgrep Guardian PreToolUse blocks all edits when not logged in
cae6658adb6d1801.prevention: Semgrep Guardian blocks Write/Edit when not logged in. Log into guardian MCP for real scans, or accept non-blocking policy with explicit product decision — do not leave unexplained permanent disable.
cae6658adb6d1801.snippet: Not logged into Semgrep Guardian decision block on Write/Edit

5cede907b3467539.title: Stale process PATH after Machine PATH fix
5cede907b3467539.prevention: After Machine PATH fix, fully restart IDE/agent shells. agentos:health uses registry PATH for bash.ok. Stale process PATH is expected until restart.
5cede907b3467539.snippet: Registry has Git first but long-lived IDE/agent still resolves System32 bash until full restart

d7552e5d3eb7fc7a.title: PowerShell mangles JSON stdin for active-prevention check
d7552e5d3eb7fc7a.prevention: Use npm run learn:prevent:test or JSON file + Get-Content -Raw; never rely on pwsh-escaped JSON pipes for prevention dry-runs
d7552e5d3eb7fc7a.snippet: pwsh echo pipe returns decision:null for ssr:false deny payload; self-test correctly denies
